text.title: FinOps — Spot / Preemptible Instances for Fault-Tolerant Workloads Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the config artefact this methodology produces, with valid + invalid examples and forbidden patterns.

example.note: Required field set to null and other required fields missing.

list.item: checkpoint_interval_seconds: must match integer maximum 300; otherwise reject.
interruption_handler: must match boolean const true; otherwise reject.
instance_diversification_count: must match integer minimum 3; otherwise reject.
az_count: must match integer minimum 2; otherwise reject.
max_price_cap: must match enum: on-demand, below-on-demand; otherwise reject.
on_demand_floor_pct: must match integer minimum 10; otherwise reject.
